blockers.blocker_reason: scanner.py still contains many historical Event Alpha command bodies and runtime config adapters that were only partially routed through cli/dispatch.py.
blockers.next_migration_module: crypto_rsi_scanner/cli/commands_event_alpha.py plus service modules for remaining scanner-bound command bodies
blockers.risk: Broad scanner command extraction can change CLI defaults, Make target behavior, provider guardrails, or research-only side-effect gates if moved without command snapshots.

blockers.blocker_reason: event_alpha_artifact_doctor.py still owns the large compatibility result dataclass, legacy counters, and remaining imperative checks while plugin migration continues.
blockers.next_migration_module: crypto_rsi_scanner/event_alpha/doctor/checks/safety.py, namespace.py, stale_artifacts.py, and focused legacy counter plugins
blockers.risk: Doctor extraction can silently change strict/WARN semantics, report counter names, or stale namespace handling if compatibility tests do not pin output.

dead_duplicate_code_removal_note: No obviously dead duplicate top-level Event Alpha code was removed in this pass; old module paths remain available until shim reports and import tests prove retirement is safe.

deprecation_plan.policy: Old top-level Event Alpha imports remain active compatibility shims; new work imports new package paths.
Old imports may warn in development mode only after old/new import tests, Make targets, and operator docs prove compatibility.
Old imports can be removed only through an explicit compatibility-breaking migration with full verification and release notes.

line_gates.blocker_reason: scanner.py still contains many historical Event Alpha command bodies and runtime config adapters that were only partially routed through cli/dispatch.py.
line_gates.next_migration_module: crypto_rsi_scanner/cli/commands_event_alpha.py plus service modules for remaining scanner-bound command bodies
line_gates.risk: Broad scanner command extraction can change CLI defaults, Make target behavior, provider guardrails, or research-only side-effect gates if moved without command snapshots.

line_gates.next_migration_module: tests/rsi, tests/cli, and tests/event_alpha for any remaining umbrella-only cases
line_gates.risk: Over-aggressive removal could break the standalone compatibility runner expected by Make and AGENTS.md.

line_gates.blocker_reason: event_alpha_artifact_doctor.py still owns the large compatibility result dataclass, legacy counters, and remaining imperative checks while plugin migration continues.
line_gates.next_migration_module: crypto_rsi_scanner/event_alpha/doctor/checks/safety.py, namespace.py, stale_artifacts.py, and focused legacy counter plugins
line_gates.risk: Doctor extraction can silently change strict/WARN semantics, report counter names, or stale namespace handling if compatibility tests do not pin output.

runtime_note: Runtimes are measured verification values supplied by the operator; null means not measured during report generation.
